name: NIST BreatheSmart CSI
summary: Government open data containing raw real and imaginary WiFi CSI for controlled respiratory-motion experiments with a breathing manikin.

settings.scenario: Anatomically correct breathing manikin under controlled respiratory motion

standardization.notes: Verified on the official BreatheSmartv2.zip member Figure 11 a/BreathingPattern1.tar.gz. The adapter pairs real/imaginary CSI CSV logs, reshapes 9 links × 114 subcarriers, preserves config metadata, and can derive 20 Hz model views.
